Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel For Plaintiff In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation is Off calendar. There is no proof of service, and movant failed to provide a courtesy copy of the filing in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
